attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.EXPENDITURE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.EXPENDITURE_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.EXPENDITURE_ENDING_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.EXPENDITURE_CLASS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.INCURRED_BY_PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.EXPENDITURE_GROUP, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.CONTROL_TOTAL_AMOUNT, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ENTERED_BY_PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.INITIAL_SUBMISSION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.REQUEST_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.PTE_REFERENCE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.DENOM_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ACCT_RATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ACCT_RATE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ACCT_EXCHANGE_RATE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ORIG_EXP_TXN_REFERENCE1, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ORIG_EXP_TXN_REFERENCE2, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ORIG_EXP_TXN_REFERENCE3, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.ORIG_USER_EXP_TXN_REFERENCE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.VENDOR_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.OVERRIDING_APPROVER_PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.WF_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.USER_BATCH_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.PERSON_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL,
 (
 select EXPENDITURE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL
 minus
 select EXPENDITURE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.EXPENDITURE_ID = STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.EXPENDITURE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
